notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins walks. Travis Bazzana to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Walls steals (4) 2nd base. Taylor Walls to 3rd. Taylor Walls advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Austin Hedges.
